headline: 暑期档新片火热，痴迷领跑热度榜
headlineEn: Summer Blockbusters Heat Up, 'Obsession' Leads Trending
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：新片《痴迷》登顶热搜，《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》紧随其后。本周《穿普拉达的女王2》《超级少女》等备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: 'Obsession' tops trending, followed by 'Silo' and 'Enola Holmes 3'. This week's highlights include 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' and 'Supergirl'.

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，本周仅一部新片
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, only one new movie this week

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》等大片即将来袭
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like 'The Devil Wears Prada 2'
